# Copilot Instructions

## 项目指南
- The user's project uses C++20, C++17, C++99 with CMake 4.2.3 (Visual Studio 17 2022 generator). Use eastl containers instead of std, Vulkan with VMA for memory, Slang for shaders, glm for math. Includes stb_image for PNG loading and recently added libktx as submodule.
